review_execution.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --tools Read,Grep,Glob --permission-mode dontAsk --output-format json

C00.summary: Actual Claude CLI rerun verified the previous P1 overclaim was fixed. permission_audit_baseline_definition remains correctly bound to RP00.P00.M05.S01 and covers minimum permission decisions, audit evidence, deny-over-allow, cross-tenant fail-closed, sensitive-action human approval, security trimming, blocked claims for missing context, six control-plane workflows, H00 evidence, and metadata-only non-goals.

parsed_review.review_notes: Actual claude-opus-4-8 max read-only CLI rerun completed with PASS and no findings. The first C00 run found one P1 overclaim and one P3 non-goal wording note; both were fixed before this PASS rerun.
